crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET POLICY Possible External IP Lookup Domain Observed in SNI (ipinfo. io)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET 443 (msg:"ET POLICY Possible External IP Lookup Domain Observed in SNI (ipinfo. io)"; flow:established,to_server; tls.sni; content:"ipinfo.io"; bsize:9; fast_pattern; classtype:external-ip-check; sid:2025331; rev:4; metadata:affected_product Windows_XP_Vista_7_8_10_Server_32_64_Bit, affected_product Mac_OSX, affected_product Linux, attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2018_02_07, deployment Perimeter, former_category POLICY, performance_impact Low, signature_severity Minor, updated_at 2022_03_24;)
